MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on TUES-NOV-25-2008: David J. Brilliant, counsel for plaintiff Gerda Kircher; Tom Russie, agent for plaintiff; Ryan L. Scher, limited scope attorney for defendant Stephen Schaem, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 1272 Market Street, #214, San Francisco, CA 94102. The DEC-01-2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Roderick Thompson, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
